linapro-monitor-operlog.description: Official source plugin for operation-log persistence and governance.

messages.deleteAllHint: When selected, the date range is ignored and all operation logs in the current permission scope are deleted.
messages.deleteRangeDescription: Select how to delete operation logs. By default, logs are cleaned by date range; selecting all logs cleans every log in the current permission scope.
messages.deleteRangeRequired: Select a complete operation log date range

linapro-monitor-operlog.name: Monitoring - Operation Logs

uninstall_blocked.retention_required: Operation logs are still inside the required retention window. Export or expire them before uninstalling.

disable_blocked.audit_required: Tenant audit policy requires operation logging to remain enabled.
